entry.title: Retrieve list of configuration file that derive company code name during OCR process.
entry.content: There is a configuration file that looks at variations of how a company code name could come in during the OCR process. The file has many different way a supplier may send an invoice for Wisconsin Public Service for example it may send WPS and the file sees that it means Wisconsin Public Service. It has all the variations that may be used for a company code. How to retrieve or extract those data, what tcode used in VIM.

entry.title: Re: Is offline mobile apps achievable with SAP Build Apps?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Are there maybe already any updates or changes to it - does Build Apps already have any offline capabilities?

Thank you and best regards, 
Goran

entry.title: Re: Enhance your SAP Datasphere Experience with API Access
entry.content:
Hi @TuncayKaraca ,

thanks for your feedback!
As CLI and API are closely linked, I want to tie that connection between the two with a focus on API. I think it is important to note, that for most use cases the CLI is a tool to call the currently internal APIs that Datasphere is offering.
We are expecting those APIs to be made publicly available so that when embedding API calls into scripting, people do not need to go the way through the CLI.

Thanks and BR,

Thore

entry.title: rush build issue while doing patch upgrade from SAP Commerce Cloud "2211.1" to "2211.21" version
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are upgrading SAP Commerce cloud patch version from 2211.1 to "2211.21"

I am getting below error during ant clean all . 

Below is my project structure. Inside git clone folder I have added sap commerce suite folder.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields for Goods Receipt Label
entry.content: Hi! I don't think it's currently possible to add more default values for the custom fields ootb at the moment. I don't see how! Manoel

entry.title: Re: "Mobile Services Cockpit - Trial" version warning "Mi...
entry.content: Hi Jitendra, thank you for the reply. CF Environment available as default for the BTP Trial account and to add it to the "Mobile Services" entitlement, we've enabled it. Maybe, something has to be adjusted in Mobile Services Cockpit? Additional information on the issue, you can find in the new attachments of my post. Thank you, Sreenu

entry.title: Re: RKSV (Austria) - new certificates by A-Trust / error...
entry.content:
Dear Rüdiger,

as far as I know, there are serveral different RKSV Provider in Austria - I don't know which USB-RKSV provider are supported by customer checkout. In the last year we often used RKSV CLOUD variants like products from primesign (also local VDA in Austria).

I think the first priority ist to raise an issue to sap, the above mention possible solutions are work arounds 🙂

BR from Vienna, Christian

thanks for your suggestion. Unfortunatley the revenue figures are integrated via BW-Live model.
I am kind of hesitant to get the data via import ...

Thanks and best regards
Axel

entry.title: Re: RKSV (Austria) - new certificates by A-Trust / error...
entry.content: @CHKNELL Thank you for your input. Did you use the RKSV CLOUD variants with the standard CCO RKSV plugin?

entry.title: Fiori PO Approver app Accept and Reject button customization from ECC backend
entry.content:
Please go through the Part 1 Forward Button customization for better understanding.

Many time there are custom requirements for which it requires the need of creating Enhancement in standard SAP functionality.

Overview : PO Approvers are maintained in Release Strategy. Once the PO is generated it is set to be approved by PO approvers based on the levels maintained in PPOME structure. Only then the PO will be set to 03 status in EKKO.

Pre-requisite : All the roles and authorization must be given to the approvers to access the PO Approval Tile in SAP Fiori.

Requirement :  If the approver find the PO is incorrect, he will reject the PO. The rejection of PO must contain the rejection text. Since the Text is an optional there comes up the challenge to make it mandatory.

Solution: 

There are many ways to do this 
1. Doing changes in Front-End using BTP/WEB IDE.

2. Making it mandatory from ECC

I chose the 2nd method since there was some issue in licensing the BTP and it was not configured correctly.

Making it mandatory from ECC


My PO tile looks like this 

When the approver click on the Reject button , he must enter the Rejection note. If he doesn't then the PO should not be rejected.

SAP has provided only few objects which can be modified without the BTP framework. PO Approval is one of it. The main thing to note and find the Odata.


How to find the OData which will can be used for my development?
You can find the OData from going to Fiori tile -> Do Frontend debugging-> Refresh the page-> Navigate to Network Tab -> Find Path starting with key words /sap/opu/odata

In my case the OData is GBAPP_POAPPROVAL
/sap/opu/odata/SAP/GBAPP_POAPPROVAL

You can also find it through the XML file 

Now you have the Standard OData name, it must be implemented so that it could connect with the backend system by providing the system name in External system. 

Odata Implementation: The ODATA deployment is Central HUB . We have separate GW systems for hosting Fiori Tiles.

Tcode : /n/iwfnd/maint_service

Now one must get 200 response after connecting it with backend system. 
Tcode : /n/iwfnd/gw_client

Till now OData is successfully configured. Now its time to find the BADI in ECC system to implement. This can be found in my previous Blog
Let me directly jump to the method which would be required to implement.
The method is Change SET_DECISION method

Here the SAP Standard documentation is pretty clear about the way of processing. You can go through it.

Accept : iv_decision = 1.
Reject : iv_decision  = 2.
If you want nothing should happen mark ev_decision_processed = 'X'. 

METHOD IF_GBAPP_EX_APV_PO_RDP~CHANGE_SET_DECISION.
" Standard Documentation: Do not delete

* This method can be used to enable execution of a workitem
* without updating a purchase order. The customer should
* implement the method and call a corresponding function to execute
* the workitem followed by COMMIT WORK.
* To avoid update of the purchase order, it is necessary to set the
* output parameter EV_DECISION_PROCESSED to 'X'.
* Preventing update of a document can be necessary, if the customer
* uses his own workflow where update of purchase order takes place
* in a separate background workflow step.
  IF iv_decision EQ 2.
    IF iv_rejection_text IS INITIAL.
      ev_decision_processed = 'X'.
    ELSE.
      DATA : t_return TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF  BAPIRET2.
      CALL FUNCTION 'ZFIORI_PO_APPROVAL_REJ_CHG' IN UPDATE TASK
        EXPORTING
          iv_ebeln = iv_pc_number
        TABLES
          t_return = t_return.
      COMMIT WORK.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.
ENDMETHOD.


As per my requirement if the approver accept I should not check anything and simply make it happen, hence I have not done anything with iv_decision = 1. If you want, you can add your custom requirement under it. 
For me I have marked ev_decision_processed = 'X', if rejection text/ note in not provided.
I have used a Update Task FM because these were the async call hence the system was giving dump while updating the EKKO. So as to correct this I have divided it in 2 Logical unit. A wait of 5 secs have introduced so that the previous task gets over.


FUNCTION zfiori_po_approval_rej_chg.
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Update Function Module:
*"
*"*"Local Interface:
*"  IMPORTING
*"     VALUE(IV_EBELN) TYPE  EBELN
*"  TABLES
*"      T_RETURN STRUCTURE  BAPIRET2
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Update Function Module:
  WAIT UP TO 5 SECONDS.
  DATA: lr_po           TYPE REF TO cl_po_header_handle_mm,
        ls_bapi         TYPE bapiret2,
        l_result        TYPE mmpur_bool,
        lv_procstat     TYPE ekko-procstat,
        ls_document     TYPE mepo_document.
  CONSTANTS: lc_status TYPE ekko-procstat VALUE '08',
             lc_set_status TYPE ekko-procstat VALUE '03',
             lc_process TYPE char16 VALUE 'PO_PROCESS',
*             lc_trtyp TYPE char1 VALUE 'VER',
*             lc_trtyp TYPE char1 VALUE 'V',
             lc_ind TYPE char40 VALUE 'RELEASE',
             lc_tcode TYPE SY-TCODE VALUE 'ME29N'.


  SELECT SINGLE procstat FROM ekko INTO lv_procstat WHERE ebeln =  iv_ebeln.
  IF lv_procstat EQ lc_status.
*  prepare creation of PO instance
    ls_document-process     = 'PO_PROCESS'.
    ls_document-trtyp       = 'VER'.
    ls_document-doc_key(10) = iv_ebeln.
    ls_document-initiator-initiator = 'RELEASE'.

    CREATE OBJECT lr_po.
    lr_po->for_bapi = 'X'.
    lr_po->po_initialize( ls_document ).
    lr_po->set_po_number( iv_ebeln ).


    CALL FUNCTION 'MEPO_DOC_READ'
      EXPORTING
        im_ebeln                       = iv_ebeln
        im_tcode                       = lc_tcode"'ME29N'
        im_trtyp                       = ls_document-trtyp
*    IM_ID                          =
        im_document                    = ls_document
*   IM_NO_MESSAGING                =
*   IM_NO_MESSAGE_REQ              =
*   IM_NO_AUTHORITY                =
* EXCEPTIONS
*   DOC_NUMBER_MISSING             = 1
*   TRANSACTION_CODE_MISSING       = 2
*   TRANSACTION_TYPE_MISSING       = 3
*   INVALID_CALL                   = 4
*   OTHERS                         = 5
              .
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
    ENDIF.
    DATA : ex_data  LIKE  mepoheader.
    CALL FUNCTION 'MEPO_DOC_HEADER_GET'
      IMPORTING
        ex_ekko = ex_data.

    IF cl_process_state_mm=>is_allowed(
                     im_bstyp   = ex_data-bstyp
                     im_state   = ex_data-procstat
                     im_process = cl_process_state_mm=>c_pr_reset_rej )
                                                          EQ mmpur_no.
      MESSAGE e806(mepo) WITH ex_data-procstat RAISING failed.
    ENDIF.
    ex_data-procstat = cl_process_state_mm=>c_active.
    lr_po->set_data( ex_data ).


    UPDATE ekko SET procstat = lc_set_status WHERE ebeln EQ iv_ebeln.
*    UPDATE ekko SET PROCSTAT = ex_data-procstat where ebeln eq iv_ebeln.
  ENDIF.

ENDFUNCTION.

entry.title: Re: NOTIFICATION FOR FAILED MEASURING POINT VALUES
entry.content:
Thanks for the Reply,

Has anyone ever did this?
Are there any reasons why it should not be done this way?

entry.title: error during sap connection
entry.content:
I'm getting the error 'Failed to create COM object `SAPbobsCOM.Company': Class not registered' when trying to connect PHP with SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.190) FP 2202 (64-bit).

my php error line is"$mycomp = new COM("SAPbobsCOM.Company") or die("Cannot start SBO");"

entry.title: Re: RKSV (Austria) - new certificates by A-Trust / error...
entry.content: Hi! No, we are not in the CCO Business - we provide an SAP AddonOn, that covers the RKSV topics - there you have the options to use the sticks (from different providers) or you can use the Cloud-RKSV Interfaces e.g. from primesign or other providers in Austria. Our add-on is used in the Austrian Cash Desk Solution from SAP or in Z-Apps from customers, that use VA01 e.g. or Z-Developments as SAP POS.

entry.title: Sales BOM
entry.content:
Hello,

Im looking for help how to configure an exploding sales BOM correctly with two plants.
(or perhaps the material is what needs to be configured?)
The scenario is that I have material X, Y, Z and when sold seperately on sales order they should go from plant A.
But when used in a sales BOM I want the material to go from plant B, but as this material is configured to go from plant A I havn't found a way to adjust this except doing it manually in each scenario when the BOM is used in a sales order.

Appreciate any kind of help and sorry if I have posted the question in the wrong board.

entry.title: Re: Use SAP Datasphere for S/4HANA Data Migration Staging...
entry.content: You have to use a database user, not a space user - "Create database users to connect external tools to SAP Datasphere."

entry.title: Re: Use SAP Datasphere for S/4HANA Data Migration Staging...
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/3de55a78a4614deda589633baea28645.html?locale=en-US&source=productlink-webassistant

entry.title: Re: -132 Error during SBO user authentication
entry.content: @ANKIT_CHAUHAN

entry.title: Re: SAC - Use a value from another table/datasource in ca...
entry.content:
Ok, in this case I would probably try to integrate the Visitor data into the BW model.

You can use constant selection to have the key figure in one separate row and then calculate a formula.

BR, Martin

entry.title: S/4 HANA Certification badge
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community.

I have just passed the C_TS4FI_2021 exam, however I have received the badge for the 2023 edition (S/4 HANA Cloud). Currently querying with SAP.

Did anyone come across anything similar?

Many thanks.

Olga Mihai

entry.title: Monitoring Apps on Kyma
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using SAP's managed Kyma environment for our commerce extensions

We have been exploring the implementation of Logging, Monitoring, Tracing & Alerting functionalities for our Kyma extensions to commerce. After a thorough review of the "Kyma Telemetry Module" documentation, it has come to our attention that telemetry data can only be effectively utilized post-configuration of a suitable backend.

 We diligently studied the integration guide - "Kyma’s Telemetry Integration Guide," and upon summarizing its contents, it appears that there are no open source or default tools within Kyma that can facilitate logging, monitoring, and alerting functionalities comparable to those provided by SAP Commerce Cloud (e.g., Dynatrace/Opensearch).

 Is there a way to ship Kyma telemetry data to our existing SAP Commerce Cloud logging/monitoring system? Alternatively, could you suggest an alternative approach? (only in context of Kyma)

I appreciate any help you can provide.

Regards,

Sarbajeet

SAP BTP, Kyma runtime SAP Commerce Cloud  @Phani

entry.title: Re: Six kinds of debugging tips to find the source code where the message is raised
entry.content: Your tips showcase a deep understanding of the intricacies of ABAP debugging, offering practical solutions to efficiently locate source code issues. I appreciate your willingness to share your expertise, as it undoubtedly benefits developers facing similar hurdles. For those seeking to enhance their debugging skills, your advice is akin to receiving valuable Manual Driving Lessons for navigating through complex coding landscapes.

entry.title: Inconsistency in automation execution time for SAP GUI for html transaction code (webgui)
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I have recorded a script to automate SAP GUI for html (web Gui), to create a process to update the business partner using T-code BP. The script is recorded fine, and I have included control 'repeat' to run this execution in loop for several interval. At the end of script, we have close application step, this is the last step. 
Now, I have tried to execute and test this for repeat intervals 2 and 5, means the script will run in loop for 2 times and 5 times each. 

Now, there’s inconsistency from script side when it reaches the last step i.e. ‘Close application’. It took just ‘1 sec’ to end the run after reaching close application, when the loop was set to 2, but for 5 loop it took ‘30 secs’.

For loop 2:
Start time: 14:39:21
Close application time: 14:39:35
End time: 14:39:36
For loop 5: 
Start time: 14:41:29
Close application time: 14:42:09
End time: 14:42:39

Even this is not consistent, at times I have noticed the same lag for 2 loops as well. I don't get any error, just the 30 sec processing gap is observed between close application and end. 

What can be the reason for this? Any suggestions to resolve this would be really helpful. 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Reclassification of Revenue Recognized Value
entry.content:
Hi All,

Requirement from client user as below example:

Contract Value = 1000000 $

Period 1: Invoice to customer 150000 $

POC from Progress Analysis : 5% 

RA Method 07 based on progress analysis

Requirement is to see the accounting entries as below during settlement:

Revenue Recognition

Dr. WIP Revenue Recognized 50000 $ (POC*Contract Value)

        Cr. Billing Account (account is the invoice) 50000 $

Reclassify to Contract Asset/Liabilities

Dr. WIP Progressive Billing 100000 $ (Total Actual Billing - Rev recognized)

        Cr. Contract Liabilities Account 100000 $ 

Period 2

No actual billing in this month

So Total Actual Billing is same

Accounting entries required during settlement:

But POC = 20%

Revenue Recognized Total = 200000 $ (POC*Contract Value). Periodic = 150000 $

Revenue Recognition

Dr. WIP Revenue Recognized = 150000 $

        Cr. Billing Account (account is the invoice) 150000 $

Reclassify to Contract Asset/Liabilities

Dr. Contract Asset Account 50000 $ (Difference in Total Actual Revenue and Total Recognized Revenue)

        Cr. WIP Revenue Recognized 50000 $ 

This requirement has come from the IFRS 15 requirement and what I understood is only possible through RAR (Revenue Accounting principle) but is it possible in any other way?

I don't think this would be possible through any other enhancement to achieve and also not achievable from our current OKG8 configuration. Correct me if wrong.

entry.title: Re: Error in Delivery creation for STO (VL10B)
entry.content: This error received due to restriction which was done internally. This was resolved.

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM - Granular Authorization to Scopes
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have configured our Integration Suite Cloud Integration service in the SAP Cloud ALM. The integration monitoring works as expected. But we want to provide access in the CALM to business users from different areas and allow them to monitor messages under their area of responsibility.  The integration flows in the cloud integration are grouped in packages per business area.

In the Cloud ALM, in the integration and exception monitoring configuration, i can add business services within cloud integration service and filter by integration package. This is also working as expected.

My question is if i can limit the scope selection to specific business services based on authorizations. I can only assign the 'ops_im_IntegrationOwner' role to the business users, having no other control on that. I'm missing anything? Is there any way to achieve the above?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP - Access Request Body in error handler for 40...
entry.content:
In this context, using context propagation works:

 

cds.context.http.req.data

Regards,

Sarbajeet

entry.title: Making tax digital SAP Business One - SSL Connection Issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can anyone advise on how the SSL connection error below can be resolved? We get this error while trying to 'Get Access Tokens' from the Electronic Document Settings. We have successfully configured the CA signed Certificate with the B1if

"Not Granted. javax.net.ssl.SSLHandshakeException: sun.security.validator.ValidatorException: No trusted certificate found javax.net.ssl.SSLHandshakeException: sun.security.validator.ValidatorException: No trusted certificate found"

Check SAP note 1074740

Regards!

Johnatan

entry.title: Re: SAP Best Practices for SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain – 2405
entry.content: Sarang Kulkarni - With 2405 should we need to download /update IBP Excel Add in version also?

entry.title: Re: Marketplace Updates not working
entry.content: Well it seems that PUT works but POST and GET do not. POST gives me a 500 code "requestFailed"

entry.title: Re: SAP Best Practices for SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain – 2405
entry.content: Hi Sarang, we always recommend using the latest version of the excel add-in 😀.

entry.title: Re: Recap of SAP S/4HANA 2023 Highlights Webinar: Overview - Gen AI and Sustainability
entry.content: Very helpful!

entry.title: Re: Query Total Per Field/Where Clause
entry.content: Thanks again, I am good

entry.title: Re: How to prepare a payload for an OData service that has no GET methods implemented?
entry.content:
Building a Payload becomes a pain when we:

1.) Don't have a GET operation (already mentioned in the blog and is also the main heading).

2.) The Real pain is when we have Associations and also with varying Cardinality ( Like 1 or Many ). I wish if there could be any tool or add-on in Postman or such Client tool which could build the Payload by just reading the Metadata file.

We have an Object which is built using RAP Custom Entity, where the consumer of this API just fills the various properties( A Primary ENTITY SET and Many related ENITITY SETs) and triggers the API and we need to create Accounting Documents, based on lot of segregations and other operations. And as a result in the end we get a Accounting Document(s) generated. So, basically for this GET operation is not needed and also not a valid requirement(I guess my above explanations were able to justify this to some extent).

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Process Governance - Email Feature
entry.content:
Hi,

A notification won’t be sent to an e-mail address coming from a role (process owner), if the user has no user in Process Governance. The background is, we try to map the e-mail address with an existing user. If we cannot, we let the field empty. It could be maybe a feature request.

entry.title: Re: RAR revenue recognition vs Results Analysis
entry.content: I have the same question. Can we somehow revive this question?

entry.title: S4HANA Material segmentation - POOL search
entry.content:
Dear Sap Experts,

I am working on S4HANA  material segmentation and logic for ATP Pool in SGT_SETUP.

I have a requirement to use 1 material , 1 segmentation strategy with different Pool search depending on the customer.

  • For 95% of the customers the search should be done among all MMBE availability in ration 1:m. The qty in SO should be confirmed if there is availability of the material in any stock segment but not only in the segment stated in SO . However, in my scenario we are not even going to register a requirement segment. So for this group of customers the qty should be confirmed as long as there is available qty for the material in MMBE.
  • For 5 % of the customers the search should not be done among all MMBE availability but it should be done in ratio 1:1 i.e. the qty in SO should be confirmed ONLY if there is availability for the material with requirement segment stated in SO.

 

I am trying to set up the requirement using SGT_SETUP -> Stock allocation  and ATP Pool.

The set up is:

 

 

Then the ATP pool is:

 

 

The problem is that the set up works for 95% of the customers i.e. the search is done among the values in Pool1.

However, for 5% of the customers if I create a SO with requirement segment 10000252 CN001 the ATP is performed again among all stock segments but not 1:1.

I can not find a way to set up the Pools per customer.

Best regards,

Diliana and Teodora

entry.title: Re: Fiori Catalogs restricted to open in mobile browser - opens in desktop site checked,
entry.content: Hi Did you find any option for your issue? We have similar requirement and wondering if this can be achived

entry.title: Unlocking the Power of Cloud
entry.content:
Embarking on a cloud migration journey can be a daunting task for any organization. Just like setting out on a long road trip, embarking on a cloud migration journey requires careful planning, a clear roadmap, and the guidance of experienced experts. SAP MaxAttention offers a distinctive solution, granting organizations access to a team of experts who can effectively guide them through their cloud journey.

In the study titled "The Total Economic Impact™ of SAP MaxAttention for Cloud Adoption," Forrester Consulting conducted interviews with 10 professionals from seven companies who have implemented SAP MaxAttention. The objective was to assess various aspects of cloud migration, including costs, benefits, and risks. The purpose of these interviews was to gain insights into the challenges, benefits, and risks associated with cloud migration. To model the results, Forrester synthesized the participants' experiences and consolidated the findings into a single composite organization representing a global enterprise entity with an annual revenue of US$25 billion. Upon careful examination of the data, Forrester concluded that SAP MaxAttention delivered a significant three-year financial impact throughout the cloud journey.

As you embark on your cloud journey, you can rely on the expertise of SAP MaxAttention professionals to provide valuable guidance and ensure your path to success. We invite you to explore the comprehensive study commissioned by SAP, titled "The Total Economic Impact™ of SAP MaxAttention for Cloud Adoption," which was published in February 2023.

entry.title: Re: Streamlining Time Sheet Approvals in SuccessFactors: Time Sheet Approval Center
entry.content: @PetraRana : Please note that currently, the links will show up for your mentioned scenario. However, on click of the corresponding page the RBP is checked and user is shown the information accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Fetch User Details
entry.content:
Hi! User APIs/Services are in scope and planned for the upcoming 2405 release, see details below:

See: https://help.sap.com/whats-new/983fc3e099074d1ea3ea6db6caf41678?Version=2405&locale=en-US&q=User%20%28User%29

Hope it helps,
Manoel

entry.title: Using BAPI_BUPA_FS_BPADDITION_CHANGE to update table BP3100 is not working
entry.content:
In SAP Credit Management the additional information (table BP3100) on credit segment level of the business partner (FIORI App – Manage credit Accounts) can be used to assign information like collateral, credit insurance data and additional information (internal credit limits).

Since release S/4HANA OnPrem 2023 FPS 01 (02/2024) there is obviously a problem with the released function modules BAPI_BUPA_FS_BPADDITION_* (CHANGE, ADD, REMOVE) since database table BP3100 is not updated with the changes made. We already tried it through SAP Standard FIORI App F4596 and by using a test sequence in SE37 in combination with BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT.

Is there anyone who has experienced the same symptom in a S/4HANA OnPrem 2023 FPS 01 (02/2024) system?  

BTW: Changes made through transaction BP in dialogue mode are working fine and updates to table BP3100 will be applied without any problem.

entry.title: Re: SAP GW Project URL and sample Input file generater
entry.content:
Brilliant efforts!!!

This would have been a boon if we could pass $metadata URI or EDMX file as an Input and get the Input Payload generated. In my case am working on RAP Custom Entity based REST APIs and there is no Project generated for the same.

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Re: Cloud ERP - Opportunities, Challenges & SAP's Outreach
entry.content:
The product deep-dive enablement series “In-Depth with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition” is ready to roll out again. The series aims to provide SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition product deep-dive knowledge, independently from the release update.

There are couple of sessions from 7th May to 27th May, 2024. Kindly refer below link for more details on Registration & for links to earlier recordings.

In-Depth With SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Series

entry.title: Manage Number Range Intervals Required For Standard Objects.
entry.content:
Our Requirement – As 'SNRO' option is not available in the Public Cloud, How can we maintain number range by selecting Object Name.

Let me give you an example,

In the ECC S4 HANA we have option with T – Code SNRO

In the SAP Public cloud, we have option like 'Manage Number Range Intervals' but in this app, we did not find any standard Objects –

Kindly Suggest if any option are exist in the Public Cloud.

@DennisLeslie  @SAPSupport @ANKIT_CHAUHAN

entry.title: Re: MB51 Report Fields in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @Suresh_Eswaran 

If you would like additional fields added to MB51 then please follow the KBA 2963059 ( https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2963059 ) and submit a feature request

 

These are standard fields and require development to enhance the fields in the app and my understanding these fields cannot be added through extensibility as they are not custom fields.

 

Please check the related apps for Display Material Document List available at the link

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('MB51')/S32 and if these new Fiori apps include receiving fields you need

 

If they don't then the alternative is create a Custom Query using the CDS views available at

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/5418de55938d1d22e10000000a44147b.html?version=2402.502

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: VL10A Red difference highlighted and red light
entry.content:
IN vl10a I HAVE LINES highlighted in red with red lights and I have other lines highlighted in red with white or green lights, I know that the lines with red lights are when the delivery date has passed, but for those with red highlights, I want to know the reason and be able to group order items that are highlighted in red.

PS : i do not have access to spro 

thanks

entry.title: How Preh eases Product Costing for Hundreds of Projects per Year with SAP Product Lifecycle Costing
entry.content:
Preh, a subsidiary of Joyson Electronics in Ningbo, China is a manufacturer of high-quality automotive
electronics systems. With more than a hundred years of experience in the electronics industry and over forty years in the automotive sector the Germany-based company has the perfect combination of access to growth markets, deep technical know-how and cost efficiency. Preh is a global growth company with five sales locations and six production plants and a strong market position in the automotive market for HMI (human machine interface) and E-mobility systems.

Processes not up to date to Support Business Growth

With constant company growth and ever-changing market requirements the product lifecycle costing at Preh had reached its limits. 

Harald Bayer, Department Head Project Calculation at Preh Group, recalls “We are on the way to becoming a two billion Euro company and doing product costing without the support of a fully integrated data processing system. For our management it was time now to give the calculation of all our new products a new basis”.

The company knew it needed a single source of truth for all product cost information that would also enable analyses and support reporting.  

Introducing a Future-Proof Standard Solution

“We looked at several software solutions on the market and our choice was SAP Product Lifecycle Costing. As we are trusting on the strength of SAP this was a decision for the future”, Harald said, and added “and an SAP standard solution is better fitting into our system landscape”.

According to the manager key objectives for the project were:

  • Replace former processes with a standardized process across the company
  • Improve quality and accuracy for product costing along the product lifecycle
  • Increase cost transparency, for reporting and analyses to easily identify cost drivers
  • Increase speed and flexibility in the product costing process and the efficiency of the entire organization

SAP Product Lifecycle Costing (SAP PLC) helps companies gain visibility across teams, calculate, and proactively manage costs, and support new product innovations and customer-specific engineered products.

A Central Database as one Source of Truth for Product and Project Calculation

Harald said “In the first step SAP Product Lifecycle Costing was implemented at our headquarters in Germany. Currently, we are doing the global rollout. This includes all business units at all locations and development centers with the goal to set a common standard with global software. And we want to make it available for all users involved in the product costing process. Therefore, we will train a large part of the entire PDP organization. There will be only one database”. He added “The solution is integrated with our SAP ERP system that is a single global instance”.

To support various stakeholders in the most efficient manner, Preh created different apps and layouts within SAP Product Lifecycle Costing (SAP PLC), for example a quality checker that helps avoid errors and therefore increase the quality of the costing result and a material price app in which the purchasing department can enter material prices that are automatically transferred into the database. In addition, the SAP Services and Support team supported the company in developing different reports and an interface to purchasing to provide up-to-date material prices.

Another partner, NTT Data, was involved with creating additional reports and analyses and with data modeling which helped create more transparency thanks to different views.

Increasing Transparency helps Identify Cost Drivers and Optimize Design 

In terms of value Preh gained Harald said “The main benefit is transparency. We can do analyses and reporting by pushing a button. With that, we know everything about cost drivers and see the entire product costing. We can easily make comparisons between different calculations and see cost bridges which was a lot of effort in the past”.

Moreover, leveraging the new database, the company can:

  • Get an easier overview which parts are used in which project
  • Get up-to-date purchasing price information, twice a day  
  • Examine calculations and prices of specific years  
  • Make more precise product and project calculations

From a business perspective this means:

  • Increased competitiveness thanks to cost transparency and insight into cost drivers to make better design decisions
  • Quick access to accurate product costing information
  • Major time savings as master data is automatically replicated from SAP ERP, allowing employees to focus on cost improvements

Harald commented “We can easier identify our cost drivers for working closely with development, purchasing, and our suppliers”.

By the end of the year, Preh plans to leverage SAP PLC to calculate more than a hundred projects with up to ten different product variants, and many more later.

The manager concluded “The choice of SAP Product Lifecycle Costing was the right decision. We were able to increase quality and accuracy in our processes and did an important step in our overall digitalization efforts”.

 

Request a demo of SAP Product Lifecycle Costing clicking here. Click here for a free trial.
Explore how to digitalize product lifecycle management for the supply chain to accelerate sustainable product innovation. In addition, check out the online story by clicking here.

entry.title: Re: Manage Number Range Intervals Required For Standard O...
entry.content:
Hi MKS,

Please use the Central Business Configuration (CBC) tool to look for "Define Number Ranges" and you find a number of hits including one for material (SSCUI #102282). Each of these SSCUIs is meant to configure the number range for their corresponding objects. If you dont yet have CBC attached to your system, then look in the "Manage Your Solution" app.

Attached is the screen shot of the number range for material/product.

Regards,

Dennis

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – App Variants are the EASY way to control App Features
entry.content: Thanks 🙂

entry.title: Re: S4H - the transfer of simulation version into the act...
entry.content: it's about LTP

entry.title: Re: How to manage two credit limits for one customer in s...
entry.content:
Hello,
You will not be able to assign items of the same sales document to different credit control areas/credit segments. The assignment happens on header level (VBAK-KKBER) not in VBAP. Maybe your logic permits different sales document types? If yes, try FM EXIT_SAPFV45K_001 - "User Exit for Determining the Credit Control Area" . This exit is called before the customizing entry to assign a sales area to a credit control area. We use it in ERP6 to assign sales order types (new machines vs. spare part business) to different credit control areas. The exit has VBAK and VBKD as parameters. 
In S/4 the credit control area determination still works as first step.Assignment to FSCM credit segments is the second step and unique from credit control area point of view.

entry.title: FISCAL YEAR VARIANT IS NOT MAINTAINED FOR CALENDAR YEAR

Good Evening Every one

fiscal year variant is not maintained for calendar year message show when display G/L account. please give me solution.

entry.title: We are getting error of 'Do not post to equity group zzz' while doing tranfer posting in MIGO
entry.content:
Hello All,

Can anyone please help me in the below JVA error we are getting.

We are trying to post a transfer entry in MIGO for material from plant 6610 to plant 6800.

But after entering all the required fields and then trying to post we are getting below JVA error of equity group as there is a validation maintained stating it should not post to corporate venture and equity group.

But we have also maintained configuration in tcode GJ55 where valuation area is maintained  against the cost object are maintained so that system should pick up automatically while posting as here valuation area = Plant.

 

Then we wanted to know why system is not picking up the WBS element from above config while posting in MIGO for getting JVA information and throwing the error ? Or is there any other config step as well we need to check from JVA side or MM side ?

Kindly help on the above issue and thank you in advance

 

Regards

Kaustubh

entry.content:
Hi, 

Currently we have a "Pay as you go for Partners" Account in our Company and using the  Business Application Studio Standard Plan.

Now we are trying to subscribe to the SAP Build Code Application. But with the Booster in our Global Account, we get the Error for "Missing Entitlements"

So we tried to change the Service Plan for SAP Business Application Studio from Standard to the Build Code Plan, described here: https://help.sap.com/docs/build_code/d0d8f5bfc3d640478854e6f4e7c7584a/d501fb669447478cbcd07a0b7b7ca4c0.html?

When following the steps, we cannot see the checkbox for "build code(Application)" in the Service Details  when adding a Service Plan  for SAP Business Application Studio in our Subaccount, like in the Screenshots in the Documentation,

Documentation:

Our System:

Any advice on how to get Access to the SAP Build Code Application?  Normally it would be available for our region "Europe (Frankfurt) AWS"

Many thanks! Max

entry.title: Re: Exploring Integration Options in SAP Datasphere with the focus on using SAP extractors
entry.content:
The strange thing to me is that ever method has its own drawbacks more than the advantages it offer...

Dataflows => simple, (too simple,) no delta support, no preload / postload commands, works in batch mode with no recovery for the committed rows. To make the most simple fake/delta method require at least 2 dataflows per table (delete+insert). It can read from files but without dynamic/runtime instantiation of sources (if you need to upload 10 different files with the same structure => 10 different dataflows or 1 with 9 union blocks and much time loss in developing it).

Replication Flows => unfeasible/unmanageable (every changes like adding a source will restart all delta from zero), They need to provide a capability to modify only part of the replication flow (only some couple of source-target) without restarting the delta from zero for non modified objects. So the best practice is: add every possible columns of every possible table you need and you will need in future (simply not feasible).

Remote Table replication => Only real time because is pushed by dpAgent (with non trivial sizing requirements), a disconnection may broke it and really rare use case for real time replication.

 

The only solution is to have replication flows with more capabilities to be managed after the first deploy ( to modify a single source-target couple ).

 

Best Regards,

Alberto

entry.title: Material segmentation Default and invalid blank value
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I am working on a material segmentation setup in S4Hana. In TC: SGT_SETUP for 1 material and 1 segmentation strategy I need to set two different default logics for the SO field - Requirement segment.

I need the two different default logics since I aim to have different behaviors of the Requirement segment field in SO depending on my customers.

For 95% of my customers, I need to have a blank and valid requirement segment field in SO. This works and can be done. Based on this set up I can create a complete SO with a blank requirement segment. It seems the blank segment is automatically set to default, so in this scenario, blank is both the Default and Valid segment.

For 5% of my customers, I have to make sure the Requirement segment field in SO is incomplete i.e. the requirement segment shouldn't have a default, and the blank shouldn't be valid. This way for 5% of the customers It will not be possible a SO to be completed unless users enter a valid Requirement segment value.

So, to meet the requirements for 5% of the customer I need the option to set the requirement segment for those 5% - the blank segment should not be valid and I don't need to have a default. However, as already mentioned,  if there is a blank value it is always the default. 

Please advise if there is a way the described behavior to be done via default set up or in any other way.

Your input will be highly appreciated

Regards

DiliK

entry.title: In House Asset Construction
entry.content: Our Company Manufactures computers we are Building a server for our internal Use. All the Materials are available in our stores department. Now we have to take the material from the Stores department for asset Building. How to take materials from the Stores department like using Production order etc. Please suggest to me the appropriate procedure.

entry.title: Re: What is the use of these two t-codes?
entry.content:
Hi Eric,

In recent S/4HANA versions, these generic tcodes are used by all tcodes defined as transaction with parameters corresponding to one Fiori or Webdynpro application, since SAP is publishing one transaction code per Fiori / WDA application to help in management of business roles and CDM exposure.

You can see it in transaction SE93 (definition of tcode) and in table TSTCP (transaction parameters). For examples :

  • tcode F2206 (Verify Service Nota Fiscal) is calling generic transaction /UI2/SAPUI5_APP_FE, and the corresponding internal Fiori app ID is populated as parameter UIAD
  • tcode F1617 (Asset Balances) is calling generic transaction /UI2/UIAD_APP, and corresponding internal WDA app ID is populated as parameter UIAD

In parallel, you can easily find information about these applications in Fiori Apps Library https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/# thank's to their application ID = transaction code

Regards

Eric

entry.title: Re: -132 Error during SBO user authentication
entry.content:
Hi staseeb,

Can you make sure that the Server and SLDServer values are correct and are in same case-letters?

If yes, there is no need for DBUserName, DBPassword or UseTrusted. Check the issue after removing those properties.

Also, refer to SAP KBA 3394748 if you have the same issue mentioned there.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Making tax digital SAP Business One - SSL Connection...
entry.content:
Hi Patumusiime,

Check SAP KBA 3269244 for the same.

It contains the link to the Guided Answer and one of the troubleshooting points is the one you reported here.

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: How to use OAuth 2.0 authorization while using SAP S/...
entry.content:
Hi Peter,

I understand your query, I recall I was part of one project where VB script code was calling our S4 API using OAuth2.0 authentication and there as well we had similar issue as yours where practically 3rd application doesn't allow popups for scope approvals as like Postman and SharePoint to some extent (we should thank to Postman for that). 

So to get rid of such situation we have a concept in OAuth i.e. "Refresh Token". I'll recommend you to play around there and research on that which might solve your requirement.

Sorry, I used such more than an year back that too for once and currently I'm in another assignment where I don't have S4 public system with me to guide you steps 😞

Hope that will solve your requirement.

entry.title: Re: Store attachments from Standard Fiori apps in Archive...
entry.content: Hi Jocelyn_Dart,

entry.title: Re: SAP API OData Security Part III – OAuth2.0 Authorization Code Flow
entry.content:
Hi @peter_munt4 ,

I have replied to your question, Please try using "Refresh Token" mechanism to bypass approval popup.

I even thought of writing blog on Refresh Token, but then I have to move to other assignment.

-RP

entry.title: SAP Recommendation: Assignment of Corporate Accounting Principle to Ledger
entry.content:
This blog aims to guide the SAP Recommendation for assigning Corporate Accounting Principles to the Ledgers for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition (Public Cloud), explain each scenario, the future impacts if the recommendation is not followed, and when it is possible to change the Corporate Accounting Principal assignment.

In the blog SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition: Options for Accounting Principles and Ledgers, you can find all the details to define how many ledgers you need to enable in your system and the available scenarios.

However, when the customer and partners activate a non-leading ledger to assign the Corporate Accounting Principle (scope item 1GA for IFRS or/and 2VA for USGP), it is essential to follow the SAP Recommendations in the SAP Help portal's Ledger scenarios: Choosing the right combination for your business needs.

Below, I am going to mention the scenarios available with Corporate Accounting Principles (Accounting Principles):

Scenario: IFRS and Local Accounting

  • Scope item activated: J58 - Local Accounting and 1GA - IFRS
  • SAP Recommendation: 
    • Ledger 0L (leading ledger) is assigned with the local accounting principle by default. Please change the assignment to the corporate accounting principle IFRS for this ledger.
    • Ledger 2L (non-leading ledger) is assigned by default to the corporate accounting principle IFRS. Please assign the local accounting principle to this ledger instead to correct this.
  • Example:

Scenario: US-GAAP and Local Accounting

  • Scope item activated: J58 - Local Accounting and 2VA - US-GAAP (USGP)
  • SAP Recommendation: 
    • Ledger 0L (leading ledger) is assigned with the local accounting principle by default. Please change the assignment to the corporate accounting principle USGP for this ledger.
    • Ledger 3L (non-leading ledger) is assigned by default to the corporate accounting principle USGP. Please assign the local accounting principle to this ledger instead to correct this.
  • Example:

 Scenario: IFRS, US-GAAP and Local Accounting

  • Scope item activated: J58 - Local Accounting, 1GA - IFRS and 2VA - US-GAAP
  • SAP Recommendation: 
    • Ledger 0L (leading ledger) is assigned with the local accounting principle by default. Please change the assignment to the corporate accounting principle IFRS for this ledger.
    • Ledger 2L (non-leading ledger) is assigned by default to the corporate accounting principle IFRS. Please assign the local accounting principle to this ledger instead to correct this.
    • Ledger 3L (non-leading ledger) is assigned by default to the corporate accounting principle USGP.
  • Example:
  •  

 

Future impacts:

If the configuration does not follow the recommended settings for their assignment of the Accounting Principles to Ledgers:

  • The future impacts when don't have one ledger at the Company Code Level (any ledger in blank), they could:
    • Not able to assign a different Accounting Principle to Company Codes in New countries
    • Nor able to enable the Tax Depreciation area 15 for Fixed Assets
    • If the customer is not planning to use Fixed Assets or expand to additional countries, the update is (still recommended but) not strictly necessary.
    • Not able to use deviating Fiscal Year Variant in the future.
    • Example of this case:
    •  

       

  • The future impact when the leading ledger does not have assigned the Accounting Principle:
    • Not able to use deviating Fiscal Year Variant in the future.
    • Example of this case:
    •  

       

It is possible to change the Accounting Principle when:

  • No postings have been made using any company code in General Ledger Accounting.
  • If postings were made in a system other than your production (P) system, you can delete these by using the Reset Transaction Data job from the Schedule Accounting Data Changes app.

Please read the information in the following links before executing the Reset Transaction Data job:

Blog:

  • Reset Transaction Data" Functionality... And when/how to use it...

SAP Help Portal:

  • Assign Accounting Principles to Ledgers and Company Codes
  • Set Up Company Code – Fixed Asset relevant details
  • Reset Transaction Data

entry.title: Re: error during sap connection
entry.content:
Hi Hugue,

Kindly make sure that 64-Bit DI API is properly installed.

Also, you need to make sure that the program is referencing to the 64-Bit DI API correctly.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: SAP DM Plugin and production process sync call
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

 

we would like to call production process from our custom Plugin, we are able to make the ajaxPost but we do not receive a good answer (202) due the async call.

We noticed that when a Production process is published on the service registry, it is automatically set as async true and in response code we can see something like

know you how can we call the Production process in sync mode to receive the correct output ?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Is extensibility possible to upload more than 999 line items by using Upload Customer Open Items app
entry.content:
Business Background:-

Our client has embarked journey of business transformation into S/4 HANA Public Cloud system. So the client has preselected scope item – J59 (Accounts Receivables) to upload customer open items (AR items) by using standard App - Upload Customer Open Item

Here the business team would be planning to use this app to upload customer open items on monthly basis hence they are intended to upload more than 2000 entries in single file.

Project Phase:- Explore

Issue Description: -

While testing the app - Upload Customer Open Item in starter system, the app is giving error message  if the upload file contains more than 2000 records

As per SAP help document , it is mentioned that each time you can upload no more than 2,000 entries in a file. If we have more than 2,000 entries in a file, split them up and upload them separately. As the maximum number of entries in an invoice during posting is limited to 999, avoid entering more entries than that number.

In current SAP ECC system of client, there is custom transaction code created which splits the file logically if items are more than 999 items. Hence the business team does not require it splits the file manually. so the business team is looking forward for similar solution where the app can able to split the files if entries more than 2000 (999 items) as it will require hugh manual efforts from business side to split the records into multiple files.

Regards,

Ajit

For some reason we can't use a custom auth object here, thanks (OR) do you have any other suggestion other than this auth. object approach, pl. let us know?

entry.title: Re: This plugin is not supported error SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi nikunjmehta2290,

This is because as of the end of 2020, SAP will no longer support Adobe Flash-based dashboards, i.e., Crystal dashboards, embedded within SAP Business One.

Check SAP Note 3014120 for the same.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: How to upload Customer Master data in S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Our client has embarked journey of business transformation into S/4 HANA Public Cloud system. Here the client has requested to develop bespoke solution to mass upload customer master data as they need to create new customers on monthly basis in Production environment. We are aware that customer master data (BP) by using standard Data migration cockpit should be recommended approach. But data templates of DMC might get changed for Business Partners for every Cloud release so the business has raised concerned about adjusting templates.

Hence we would like to know if there is any standard best practice available for mass upload of customers (other than DMC)

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: FISCAL YEAR VARIANT IS NOT MAINTAINED FOR CALENDAR YEAR
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check these configurations:

  • T-Code - OBY6 - How to Check Fiscal year Variant in SAP
  • T-Code - OB37 - Assigning a Fiscal Year Variant to a Company Code
  • T-Code - OB29 - Create a Fiscal year Variant in SAP
    You can also find more information in this article.

Thanks, Arthur

entry.title: Displaying Sub-Properties in Object Table Fields from a REST API Call/Response
entry.content:
Hello MDK SAP Community,

I am seeking assistance with displaying the sub-properties of a REST API response within the fields of an Object Table, within e.g. the "Title" and "Subhead" fields.
I am working with the following API endpoint: https://dummyjson.com/products
The JSON response I am receiving is structured as follows:

 

{ "products": [ { "id": 7, "title": "Samsung Galaxy Book", "description": "Samsung Galaxy Book S (2020) Laptop With Intel Lakefield Chip, 8GB of RAM Launched", "price": 1499, "discountPercentage": 4.15, "rating": 4.25 }, { "id": 8, "title": "Microsoft Surface Laptop 4", "description": "Style and speed. Stand out on HD video calls backed by Studio Mics. Capture ideas on the vibrant touchscreen.", "price": 1499, "discountPercentage": 10.23, "rating": 4.43 }, // Additional product objects... ] }

 

My goal is to extract e.g. the "id" and "title" properties from each product and display them in the "Title" and "Subhead" fields (just as example), respectively, of an Object Table.

I have attempted the following bindings, but none have worked:

  • "Title": {id}, "Subhead": {title}
  • "Title": {products.id}, "Subhead": {products.title}
  • "Title": {products[].id}, "Subhead": {products[].title}
  • "Title": {products[0].id}, "Subhead": {products[0].title}
  • "Title": {products/id}, "Subhead": {products/title}

I can confirm that the API call is successful, as I am receiving a 200 OK status along with the expected response data.
For single product calls such as "https://dummyjson.com/products/1", the mapping of "Title": {id} and "Subhead": {title} works well. However, the issue presents itself when attempting to list multiple products.

Could someone please guide me on the correct way to bind these (sub)properties within an Object Table for a list of products?

Thank you for your time and assistance.
Khaled El Ghali

entry.title: Re: Backend system for S4 hana public cloud 2402 for debu...
entry.content:
Hello Kristin,

Sure thanks

entry.title: Re: How to use .rpt file created for windows application...
entry.content:
CR doesn't support Java script directly, you can however use Eclipse to host the CR runtime which you should be able to call using JS file.

To download and access samples go here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354088796.html

entry.title: Re: An error occurred, please create an incident (component CA-ATP-BOP)
entry.content: any solutions? I've run into the same error.

entry.title: Re: Authorization object delivered by SAP
entry.content:
Those are the correct steps, but keep in mind this is a modification of system, so write some documentation for SAP updates (can, so will, remove your changes)

Be aware that

  • only limited changes are allowed (check my answer at su21 - edit existing object? )
  • you have now to add some code to disable input on those field in standard logic (or use some substitution to remove changes and display a message )

entry.title: Storage location cannot be found in sales order
entry.content:
Based on shipping conditions, plant and shipping point the system should find storage location for the sales order.

How can we get the storage location automatically filled in sales order?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Storage location cannot be found in sales order
entry.content:
In S/4HANA Cloud it is not possible to determine the storage location automatically. 

In OnPrem this can be done, only through the implementation of a userexit - This same userexit is not exposed within the cloud solution.

entry.title: Re: "Related ID " is not reflecting in ARIBA contract work space which is triggered from
entry.content: Any updates on this question? We are encountering the same issue but with our ERP as S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: BP relationship for credit management valid for all checking rules
entry.content: Hello, same requirements here. Higher-level accounts check is working only for static check. Is there any standard way to check overdues, for example, for connected customers via relationship?

entry.title: Re: Authorization object delivered by SAP
entry.content: Thank you Raymond, just checking, do you have any other idea other than the Auth. object approach?
